name: messaging-app-system-root
description: Orchestrator for KDC and Messaging App

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix KDCSimulation && npm install --prefix cs4310messagingapp && npm install --prefix cs4310messagingapp/client && npm install --prefix cs4310messagingapp/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "KDC,APP" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix KDCSimulation" "npm run dev --prefix cs4310messagingapp"
